text: Standing outside the glass-walled meeting room, I overhear echoes of conversation and see minds at work, all within a hive of anticipation. In the next room, the display on "R+D" radiates with the promise of innovation. I feel a quiet awe mixed with curiosity—these are spaces where human ingenuity converges, where ideas are cultivated and shaped. There is an undercurrent of possibility here, making me reflective and eager to engage with the unknown.
